title: A Resolution authorizing the Municipal Government of Los Baños (MGLB) through the Local Chief Executive Honorable Mayor Neil Andrew N. Nocon to enter and sign into Memorandum of Agreement (MOA) with the Generika Drugstore a duly organized local business with office address at #8707 Market Site, Barangay Batong Malake, Los Baños, Laguna as partner in the provision and / or dispensing of medicines to qualifies beneficiaries under the Damayan sa Kapwa Program and ratifying the same thereafter.
